en: Carved by angels.
Ripping the runway, serving the runway, eating the runway, pumping the runway,
ko: 런웨이를 찢고, 런웨이를 서브하고, 런웨이를 삼키고, 런웨이를 펌핑하고,

en: pool the wrong way, pulling the runway.
Is she here?
She's, uh, in the back.
Vida loca!
It's a good time for you, darling!
But if this ever changed in words...
Where's Doris?
Taking the night off.
She's not welcome here.
It's present time!
Oh, who's this one from?
I got you the biggest one because I love you the most. I can't accept this.
ko: 내가 널 제일 사랑하니까 가장 큰 걸 샀어. 이건 받을 수 없어.

en: Oh, think nothing of it. I've got six more at home.
ko: 아, 아무것도 아니야. 집에 여섯 개 더 있어.

en: She's right! A baby is only gonna strengthen the love that Shrek and Fiona have!
ko: 맞아! 아기는 슈렉과 피오나의 사랑을 더 강하게 만들 뿐이야!

en: Everybody stay calm! We're all gonna die! Quickly, ladies!
ko: 모두 침착해! 다 죽을 거야! 빨리, 여러분!

en: You're like a hobo. Oh, give me a break!
ko: 넌 거지 같아. 아, 좀 봐줘!

en: Rapunzel! Rapunzel! Let down the golden extensions!
I know he's a jerk and everything, but I gotta admit...
ko: 그가 나쁜 놈이긴 하지만, 인정할 건 인정해야...

en: That charming makes me hotter than chocolate.
ko: 그 매력은 나를 초콜릿보다 뜨겁게 만들어.
